requirements.summary: Update all instances of the team/brand name text labels across the frontend so they are displayed as three separate styled elements: 'Legend', 'X', and 'Arena' — each word on its own line or as a distinct styled segment, consistent with the esports visual theme
acceptanceCriteria: The brand/team name is rendered as three distinct text elements: 'Legend', 'X', and 'Arena'
Each word ('Legend', 'X', 'Arena') is visually separated and styled consistently with the existing esports theme
The label appears correctly in the Navbar, HeroSection, and Footer wherever the team name is displayed
No other text content is altered

file_operations.description: Update the brand logo text to display 'Legend', 'X', and 'Arena' as three distinct styled text elements separated visually (e.g., using line breaks or styled spans). Maintain the existing esports theme styling and ensure the logo remains recognizable and accessible.

Update any team/brand name text in the hero section to display 'Legend', 'X', and 'Arena' as three separate styled elements. Each word should be visually distinct, maintaining consistency with the esports visual theme and the updated Navbar styling.

Update the brand logo text in the footer to display 'Legend', 'X', and 'Arena' as three distinct styled elements. Ensure the styling is consistent with the Navbar and HeroSection updates while fitting naturally within the footer layout.
